hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); BLOCKED=''; case "$CMD" in *'rm -rf /'*) BLOCKED='rm -rf /' ;; *'rm -rf ~'*) BLOCKED='rm -rf ~' ;; *'rm -rf .'*) BLOCKED='rm -rf .' ;; *'DROP TABLE'*|*'drop table'*) BLOCKED='DROP TABLE' ;; *'DROP DATABASE'*|*'drop database'*) BLOCKED='DROP DATABASE' ;; *'--force'*push*|*push*'--force'*|*'-f'*push*|*push*'-f'*) BLOCKED='force push' ;; *'reset --hard'*) BLOCKED='git reset --hard' ;; *'checkout -- .'*|*'checkout .'*) BLOCKED='git checkout .' ;; *'clean -f'*) BLOCKED='git clean -f' ;; *'terraform destroy'*) BLOCKED='terraform destroy' ;; esac; if [ -n "$BLOCKED" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: $BLOCKED — too dangerous to run without explicit approval" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
